title: D & A Borderless Glass
body:
# 🪟 Borderless Glass – Clean & Seamless Windows
Borderless Glass is a Minecraft resource pack that removes the harsh outlines and streaks from glass blocks and panes, giving you a clean, clear, and modern look. Perfect for builders, architects, and aesthetic-focused players who want beautiful windows and transparent builds without distractions.

🎨 Features:
❌ Removes borders and streaky textures from all glass types

🧼 Clean, seamless look for all colors of stained glass

🏗️ Ideal for modern builds, greenhouses, underwater bases, and sky bridges

🖥️ Lightweight & performance-friendly (no custom models)

🧊 Compatible with Connected Textures (CTM) using OptiFine or Continuity

🔧 Compatibility:
Feature	Supported
Minecraft Java 1.8+	✅ Yes
OptiFine CTM	✅ Optional
Sodium + Continuity	✅ Yes
Fabric / Forge	✅ Yes
Shaders	✅ Compatible
Bedrock Edition	❌ No (Java only)

📦 Installation:
Download the .zip file

Place it into your resourcepacks folder

Enable the pack in Options → Resource Packs

(Optional) For connected glass, install OptiFine or Continuity

Enjoy clean, streak-free windows!

🔎 Notes:
Pairs great with fullbright or modern texture packs

Use on top of other packs to override their glass textures

No gameplay or model changes — just visuals

🖼 Preview Ideas (Optional):
A glass dome from underwater

Modern house with colored glass windows

Nether hub with colored panes

Let me know if you want:

A Modrinth/GitHub README

A version with light fog in glass
